title: MBT harness (machine-as-oracle)
manager: Model-based testing where the FSL machine is the oracle — vals act as shadow state, contracts as pre/post conditions, and named hooks as the real operations under test — so you test a real system by checking it against its FSL model. This is the highest-leverage use of a formal model: the machine you specified becomes the automated judge of whether the real implementation behaves, generating tests and verdicts from the spec itself.
cs: MBT harness (machine-as-oracle): vals=shadow state, contracts=pre/post, named hooks=real ops; fsl#622 (jssm twin); the model becomes the test oracle for a real system.
